ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model (e.g., AFRT, DAG, LINTRAN) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the model is distributed */,
  "source_code_url" TEXT /* URL to the source code repository */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the model was published */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Reference or citation for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation metric (e.g., Complete documentation, Maintained version control) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation metric */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the metric in overall evaluation scores */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., percentage, score, time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation metric used */,
  "score" REAL /* Score assigned to the model based on the evaluation metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the evaluation was conducted */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the evaluation */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes provided by the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES evaluation_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who uploaded the dataset */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, NetCDF) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Whether the dataset is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_dataset_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "score" REAL /* Score assigned to the model based on the dataset */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the evaluation was conducted */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the evaluation */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes provided by the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_dataset_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_dataset_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* A brief description of the researcher's interests */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the researcher's profile or webpage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher performing the evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "score" REAL /* Score assigned to the model by the researcher */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the evaluation was conducted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes provided by the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_model_evaluations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_dataset_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher performing the evaluation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being evaluated */,
  "score" REAL /* Score assigned to the dataset by the researcher */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the evaluation was conducted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes provided by the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_dataset_evaluations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_dataset_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation that generated the result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the evaluation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the evaluation */,
  "score" REAL /* Score assigned to the model on the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., pending, completed, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result that the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Complete documentation, Maintained version control) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric for the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the metric (e.g., pending, completed, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_metrics_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher participating in the collaboration */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation that the collaboration is for */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the collaboration started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the collaboration ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the team (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that the member belongs to */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who is a team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member within the team */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the member joined the team */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the member left the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations_shared" (
  "shared_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shared evaluation */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being shared */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher sharing the evaluation */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that the evaluation is being shared with */,
  "shared_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the evaluation was shared */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shared evaluation (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shared_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_shared_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_shared_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_shared_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation that the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the evaluation */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_versions_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)
